Bash(PGPASSWORD=1234 psql -h localhost -p 5432 -U postgres -d fuzabalta_roulette -c "SELECT * FROM motor_scores;")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=1234 psql -h localhost -p 5432 -U postgres -d fuzabalta_roulette -c "
-- Simula sinais resolvidos para 'aovivo' com dados realistas
-- Mix de WIN e LOSS para cada modo \(0, 1, 2\)

INSERT INTO motor_pending_signals \(source, suggested_numbers, spins_after, resolved_modes, resolved, spin_results, created_at\) VALUES
-- WIN no gale 1 \(modo 0: exato, modo 1: +vizinhos, modo 2: +vizinhos\)
\('aovivo', '{5,8,11,23,30}', 3, '{\\"0\\": \\"win\\", \\"0_gale\\": 1, \\"0_hit\\": 23, \\"1\\": \\"win\\", \\"1_gale\\": 1, \\"1_hit\\": 23, \\"2\\": \\"win\\", \\"2_gale\\": 1, \\"2_hit\\": 23}', TRUE, '{23,14,7}', NOW\(\) - INTERVAL '25 minutes'\),

-- LOSS no modo 0, WIN gale 2 no modo 1 \(vizinho acertou\), WIN gale 1 no modo 2
\('aovivo', '{3,15,26,32,35}', 3, '{\\"0\\": \\"loss\\", \\"1\\": \\"win\\", \\"1_gale\\": 2, \\"1_hit\\": 16, \\"2\\": \\"win\\", \\"2_gale\\": 1, \\"2_hit\\": 4}', TRUE, '{4,16,9}', NOW\(\) - INTERVAL '22 minutes'\),

-- LOSS total — nenhum modo acertou
\('aovivo', '{0,6,17,22,28}', 3, '{\\"0\\": \\"loss\\", \\"1\\": \\"loss\\", \\"2\\": \\"loss\\"}', TRUE, '{12,33,1}', NOW\(\) - INTERVAL '18 minutes'\),

-- WIN gale 3 no modo 0, WIN gale 2 nos modos 1 e 2
\('aovivo', '{2,10,19,25,34}', 3, '{\\"0\\": \\"win\\", \\"0_gale\\": 3, \\"0_hit\\": 25, \\"1\\": \\"win\\", \\"1_gale\\": 2, \\"1_hit\\": 20, \\"2\\": \\"win\\", \\"2_gale\\": 1, \\"2_hit\\": 9}', TRUE, '{9,20,25}', NOW\(\) - INTERVAL '15 minutes'\),

-- WIN gale 1 em todos os modos
\('aovivo', '{7,12,18,29,36}', 3, '{\\"0\\": \\"win\\", \\"0_gale\\": 1, \\"0_hit\\": 29, \\"1\\": \\"win\\", \\"1_gale\\": 1, \\"1_hit\\": 29, \\"2\\": \\"win\\", \\"2_gale\\": 1, \\"2_hit\\": 29}', TRUE, '{29,0,14}', NOW\(\) - INTERVAL '12 minutes'\),

-- LOSS modo 0 e 1, WIN gale 3 modo 2
\('aovivo', '{1,4,13,20,31}', 3, '{\\"0\\": \\"loss\\", \\"1\\": \\"loss\\", \\"2\\": \\"win\\", \\"2_gale\\": 3, \\"2_hit\\": 21}', TRUE, '{8,16,21}', NOW\(\) - INTERVAL '9 minutes'\),

-- WIN gale 2 modo 0, WIN gale 1 modo 1 e 2
\('aovivo', '{9,14,21,27,33}', 3, '{\\"0\\": \\"win\\", \\"0_gale\\": 2, \\"0_hit\\": 14, \\"1\\": \\"win\\", \\"1_gale\\": 1, \\"1_hit\\": 22, \\"2\\": \\"win\\", \\"2_gale\\": 1, \\"2_hit\\": 22}', TRUE, '{22,14,3}', NOW\(\) - INTERVAL '5 minutes'\),

-- LOSS modo 0, WIN gale 1 modo 1, WIN gale 2 modo 2
\('aovivo', '{6,16,24,30,35}', 3, '{\\"0\\": \\"loss\\", \\"1\\": \\"win\\", \\"1_gale\\": 1, \\"1_hit\\": 5, \\"2\\": \\"win\\", \\"2_gale\\": 2, \\"2_hit\\": 5}', TRUE, '{5,11,19}', NOW\(\) - INTERVAL '2 minutes'\);
"])

Bash(PGPASSWORD=1234 psql -h localhost -p 5432 -U postgres -d fuzabalta_roulette -c "
SELECT id, suggested_numbers, spins_after, resolved_modes, spin_results, created_at
FROM motor_pending_signals
WHERE source = 'aovivo' AND resolved = TRUE
ORDER BY created_at DESC;
")
